name: Inside Job RPG
description:
⚙️˚·•.°You're a new worker at Cognito Inc.°.•·˚⚙️

This is my first RPG request >:))

Surprised that there wasn't one already-

KENDRICK‼️‼️ DROP ANOTHER DISS-TRACK, AND MY LIFE, IS YOURSSSS‼️

Help there's a baby crying outside

Uh go my child, take this bot and do a crime or something idk

Characters added: JR, Rand Ridley, Reagan Ridley, Cognito Inc.,The Illuminati, The Reptoids,The Catholic Church, The Atlanteans, The Juggalos, The Shadow Board, Brett Hand, Andre Lee, Glenn Dolphman, Gigi Thompson, Myc Cellium, Ron Stadetler (let me know if I should add anything/anyone else!)

This is my first attempt at making an RPG bot so if there are any issues lmk! (Cause I tried this bot to make sure it worked and it started speaking to me in French so...just say if there's anything.)
